app.name: Aush Forms
app.description: Streamline your client onboarding with intelligent forms that read documents automatically.
hero.title: Smart Client Intake Forms
hero.subtitle: Stop chasing paperwork. Aush Forms reads your clients' documents with AI-powered OCR and fills in the fields automatically.
howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.step1.title: Pick a Template
howItWorks.step1.description: Choose from Financial, Medical, Legal, or General intake templates.
howItWorks.step2.title: Share Your Link
howItWorks.step2.description: Get a custom link to share with your clients via email, text, or your website.
howItWorks.step3.title: Receive Submissions
howItWorks.step3.description: Clients fill out the form, upload documents, and submit — you get notified instantly.
templates.title: Templates for Every Industry
templates.subtitle: Pre-built intake forms tailored to your business type.
templates.financial.name: Financial Services
templates.financial.description: Tax prep, financial planning, insurance, investment management.
templates.medical.name: Healthcare
templates.medical.description: Medical offices, clinics, dental practices, therapy.
templates.legal.name: Legal Services
templates.legal.description: Law firms, legal consultations, case intake.
templates.general.name: General
templates.general.description: General purpose intake for any business type.
features.title: Everything You Need
features.subtitle: Powerful features that make intake effortless.
features.ocr.title: OCR Auto-Fill
features.ocr.description: Upload a driver's license or pay stub — fields fill themselves.
features.multilang.title: Multi-Language
features.multilang.description: English and Spanish support built in.
features.autosave.title: Auto-Save
features.autosave.description: Progress saves automatically. Come back anytime.
features.pdf.title: PDF Export
features.pdf.description: Professional branded PDF generated on every submission.
features.darkmode.title: Dark Mode
features.darkmode.description: Light and dark themes for every preference.
features.mobile.title: Mobile Ready
features.mobile.description: Snap photos of documents directly from your phone.
features.notifications.title: Instant Notifications
features.notifications.description: Get alerted the moment a new submission comes in.
features.branding.title: Custom Branding
features.branding.description: Your logo, your colors, your professional look.
testimonials.title: Trusted by Businesses
testimonials.1.quote: Aush Forms cut our intake time from 20 minutes to 5. The OCR feature alone is worth it.
testimonials.1.name: Sarah Chen
testimonials.2.quote: Our patients love how easy it is. They upload their insurance card and everything fills in.
testimonials.2.name: Dr. Marcus Rivera
testimonials.3.quote: We used to lose clients during the paperwork phase. Now they complete intake in minutes.
testimonials.3.name: Amanda Foster
cta.title: Ready to streamline your intake?
cta.subtitle: Join hundreds of businesses saving time with smart forms.
footer.built: Built with care by Aush Forms.
